name: Willard Scott's Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all cake ingredients together at medium speed in a mixer until well blended.
2. Pour into 3 prepared 9-inch cake pans.
3. Bake at 350°F for approximately 20 minutes.
Frosting:
1. Beat the first three frosting ingredients together until fluffy.
2. Fold in 1 1/2 cups pecans, reserving 1/2 cup to decorate the top of the cake.
3. Frost cooled cake layers, then decorate the top.
4. Chill cake one hour or more before serving.
